description: Load liveness check (1-token generation to confirm model loads without OOM)
notes: Liveness check only; coherent generation quality is covered by kimi_k26_default_decode_smoke.json.
Programmatic load requires model_config={"expert_offload": true}; CLI --expert-offload flag sets this automatically.
mx.load on safetensors is mmap-backed; non-expert keys span all 64 shards but peak RSS stayed bounded.
Tokenizer uses TikToken fallback (cosmetic regex warning, non-blocking).
